productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Grey Casual Shoes
description: Perfect for those casual outings, this suede and leather shoe from red tape is all that you need to speak your style statement loud and clear. Casual yet fashionable, this shoe makes for a great semi-formal footwear too for those casual Fridays.Upper Suede upper for durability and comfort Full grain leather toe cap, midfoot, forefoot and collar foxing, and heel cup for enhanced durability and style Stitch detailing to enhance shoe life Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Leather collar with a fabric inner lining for breathable comfort Leather footbed for a comfortable, all-day wear Outsole Durable rubber outsole with semi-circular lugs and grooves, and multi-directional lugs on the periphery for maximum grip and traction on various terrain Outsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe guard and heel guard for enhanced protection Shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineUse a suede brush to remove dust from the suede surfaceDo not store in direct sunlight
